title: create new folders in Thunderbird
creator: nleighton
content: I have just reinstalled T/B (3-4 times now). Scanned barcode from notebook. Installed ok. This mobile T/B DOES NOT give me any option to add folders. Only: inbox, outbox, drafts, sent, deleted. I at least want (1) extra folder to store messages. How do I achieve this? Thanks My laptop T/B works well (on Ubuntu)

title: Cannot connect Gmail account to Thunderbird Mobile
creator: ines.abraham
content: I cannot connect my gmail account to Thunderbird for Android (although no problem whatsoever in Thunderbird for Computer). It always fails when Thunderbird tries to connect the SMTP outgoing server. Then it says after a while NETWORK ERROR failed to connect to smtp.gmail.com .... I am using the standard IMAP configurations. Please help.

title: How to control how many connections Thunderbird for Android can do with the IMAP server?
creator: marcoshalano
content: Sometimes I got a problem with Gmail where I get the error "Too many simultaneous connections", both desktop and Android. I found that Gmail servers support 15 connections. I could reduce the number of connections for desktop in the config editor, but I would like how to do that in the Android app. Some times it creates a lot of connections, and I think the numbers stack up together with dead connection when I reboot my router and get a new IP, so I'm wondering how to set to get just one or two simultaneous connections on Android.
